tasks.description: Comprehensive analysis of SyncPulse v2 design tokens

findings.glassmorphism: 22px blur, 0.075 opacity background - Good but opportunity to reduce to 0.03
findings.animations: 4 keyframes defined - Solid foundation, can be enhanced with quantum patterns
findings.components: 8 component token groups with semantic colors - STRONG

successSummary: Phase 1 audit and analysis complete. SyncPulse has strong foundation with purple-neon theme and professional styling. Quantum enhancement strategy identifies 5 key improvement areas with clear priorities. All artifacts documented. Ready to signal Phase 2 teams for color system enhancement. Timeline: 5 working days total, 20-25 hours effort. Risk: LOW (additive changes). ROI: HIGH (significant visual transformation).
